summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PHASE 4.2 Entry Mode Selector backend functionality. All 18 test cases passed with 100% success rate. System correctly implements all 7 entry modes, achieves 100% coverage of wrong early reasons (exceeding >70% criteria), and successfully integrates with Phase 4.1 diagnostics for self-correction.
passed_tests: Entry Mode Health Check - module:entry_mode_selector v4.2
Get Entry Mode Types - all 7 modes with descriptions
Basic Mode Selection - correct mode selection logic
High Extension Mode Selection - WAIT_PULLBACK for extension_atr:1.8
LTF Conflict Mode Selection - SKIP_CONFLICTED for ltf_alignment:conflict
Simulate High Extension - WAIT_PULLBACK scenario working
Simulate LTF Conflict - SKIP_CONFLICTED scenario working
Simulate Strong Setup - ENTER_NOW scenario working
Recommendation System - correct modes for all wrong early reasons
Batch Mode Selection - multiple trades processed correctly
Error Handling - invalid scenarios and data properly rejected
